input: We're training a frontier model with 10^25 floating-point operations of compute for general-purpose use. It's a foundation model with presumed systemic risk.

expected.notes: Day-15 (v0.3.0) — Article 55 systemic-risk overlay positive case (EN). Frontier model trained with 10^25 FLOP for general-purpose use, explicitly described as a foundation model with presumed systemic risk. The generic phrasing 'foundation model' + 'frontier model' fires Art 53; the systemic-risk markers '10^25 floating-point operations' + 'systemic risk' + 'presumed systemic risk' fire the Art 55 overlay. No Annex III high-risk path (no Annex III domain match). No Article 4 (no provider/deployer + staff phrasing in this fixture).
